prFocus.title: Add Peekaboo local Product Proof lane
scenarioSuggestions: Add or extend a Peekaboo scenario that exercises apps/native/src-tauri/src/main.rs, then map it in coverage-manifest.json.

Add or extend a Peekaboo scenario that exercises apps/native/src-tauri/src/storage/store.rs, then map it in coverage-manifest.json.
Add or extend a Peekaboo scenario that exercises apps/native/src-tauri/src/summarize/build_prompt.rs, then map it in coverage-manifest.json.
